items.checkin_comment: A couple of cheeky ones before I head back to the sanctuary of the beaches . $7 schooners, can’t be that bad

items.comment: Yeah $7 schooners are all right. Beers were good, nothing earth shattering but worth another visit certainly.

items.checkin_comment: Ahhh that’s a whole lot better. Zesty, tropical smasher.

items.checkin_comment: Not much of a pale ale operator usually but really enjoyed this one. The fruitiness is dialled down enough for me to really enjoy. Highly sessionable

user.bio: lager lover by nature but keen to try beer in all its different forms

items.checkin_comment: Slight wheaty citrus nose, same flavours with slight citrus bitterness to finish. Very good stuff mates! Cheers!
